entries.spec_requirement_id: Auto-merge-to-main is the default at Phase 8
acceptance_criteria: clean Phase 8 merges --no-ff into main, pushes (when AUTO_PUSH), deletes branch local+remote, removes worktree
push rejection stops + reports, never force-pushes
conflict leaves branch+worktree intact and reports, never forces
--no-auto-merge (+ NL: keep the branch / PR only / don't merge to main / no auto-merge) reverts to feature-branch+push+PR-recommend behavior

scenarios: stray branches trigger the reconcile prompt
no stray branches is a silent no-op
acceptance_criteria: one prompt offers merge-all-clean+prune / prune-without-merge / leave
only cleanly-mergeable architect-team/* branches are merged; conflicts reported

scenarios: list_run_branches reports merge status per branch
merge helper aborts cleanly on conflict
acceptance_criteria: list_run_branches returns per-branch merged/cleanly-mergeable status, excludes non-architect-team branches
merge_branch_to_main_and_prune merges clean branch + pushes + deletes branch + removes worktree; aborts + changes nothing on conflict; best-effort
CHANGELOG v3.7.0 entry; README + CLAUDE.md current
